differential_diagnoses: Obstructive sleep apnea / Obesity hypoventilation syndrome with pulmonary hypertension
Cerebral small vessel disease with pseudobulbar palsy
next_steps: Repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) of multiple muscles
Serologic testing for acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibodies
Lumbar puncture for CSF protein and cytology
Consultation with pulmonology for formal sleep study and pulmonary function testing
Continuous cardiac telemetry and optimization of respiratory support

differential_diagnoses: Obesity Hypoventilation Syndrome with secondary pulmonary hypertension
Cerebral Small Vessel Disease with pseudobulbar palsy
next_steps: Serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chain assay
Repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and needle electromyography (EMG)
Bedside negative inspiratory force (NIF) and forced vital capacity (FVC) monitoring
Echocardiogram with focus on global longitudinal strain to evaluate for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Serum acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibody testing
Lumbar puncture for protein and cytology
Continuous cardiac telemetry and optimization of respiratory support (BiPAP)
